summary: Iteration 3 testing: BACKEND 100% (28/28 pytest). All new settings endpoints work: GET /api/settings public returns hero_image_url (default Pexels mother photo), PATCH /api/admin/settings updates + 401 w/o auth + 400 on empty, POST /api/admin/settings/hero-image uploads PNG (verified roundtrip: upload -> /api/files/<path> URL -> public GET reflects new URL), 401 w/o auth, 400 on .txt. Regression all green (schools, auth, delivery pickup/delivery, trash, soft/restore/hard-delete). FRONTEND ~75%: Home hero correctly shows mother shopping photo (NOT logo), school-search-input filters to 1 Talca card on 'talca' and 0 on 'xyz', school-search-clear works, Talca celeste accents verified (border-[#8ECEF2]/50, gradient E6F4FB->F0F9FE, 'Uniforme celeste' chip), header bg rgba(250,250,247,0.95)=#FAFAF7, Contacto map iframe contains -35.4253351,-71.6132162 coords AND 'Calle 36 Ote. 1994, Talca' address, 'Made with Emergent' text is hidden (display:none via EmergentBadgeHider parent). CRITICAL ADMIN REGRESSIONS FOUND: (1) tab-settings TabsTrigger is MISSING from TabsList - only 4 tabs render (dashboard/products/orders/trash). TabsContent value='settings' exists at line 325 but has no clickable button, so SettingsPanel is completely inaccessible via UI. (2) SizeBreakdownTable component is defined (line 333) but NEVER rendered in <TabsContent value='dashboard'> - users can't see size-by-size table. (3) Stat card labels do NOT switch to 'Stock talla L' when size filter is selected - they remain 'Productos/Stock total/Stock bajo/Sin stock' regardless of sizeFilter value (though values correctly update).

ui_bugs.issue: Missing <TabsTrigger value='settings' data-testid='tab-settings'> - the Ajustes/Settings tab button is not rendered in the TabsList although its TabsContent exists. Users cannot access the SettingsPanel/hero-image upload UI.
SizeBreakdownTable (data-testid='size-breakdown-table') is defined but never mounted inside <TabsContent value='dashboard'>. Needs to be rendered after the stock chart.

Stat card labels remain hardcoded ('Productos/Stock total/Stock bajo/Sin stock') and don't change to 'Stock talla L' when sizeFilter is applied. Value computation is correct but labels don't reflect the active size filter.

cannot be a child of

action_items: Add <TabsTrigger value='settings' data-testid='tab-settings'> inside the TabsList (around line 241-242) with SettingsIcon + 'Ajustes' label so the already-coded Settings tab becomes clickable.
Mount <SizeBreakdownTable products={filteredProducts} sizeFilter={sizeFilter} /> inside <TabsContent value='dashboard'> after the stock-chart-card block.

Make StatCard labels dynamic: when sizeFilter !== 'all', change 'Stock total' -> `Stock talla ${sizeFilter}`, 'Stock bajo (<10)' -> `Stock bajo talla ${sizeFilter}`, etc., so the label reflects the current size filter as requested.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.jsx is 714 lines - should be split into DashboardTab, ProductsTab, OrdersTab, TrashTab, SettingsPanel, SizeBreakdownTable submodules for maintainability.
SettingsPanel + SizeBreakdownTable are fully implemented in the file but orphaned from the UI (Settings has no tab trigger; SizeBreakdownTable has no parent render call). This is a plain wiring bug.
Pre-existing (iter 1/2): stock decrement in POST /api/orders is not atomic (race condition); JWT_SECRET fallback to 'dev-secret'.

Request 'Made with Emergent' badge hiding: the EmergentBadgeHider correctly sets display:none on the matching

element. Element still exists in DOM (as expected from MutationObserver approach) but is not visible to users.

success_rate.frontend: ~75% (3 critical admin wiring bugs: tab-settings missing, size-breakdown-table not mounted, stat labels not dynamic)

seed_data_creation: Uploaded a 1x1 PNG via /api/admin/settings/hero-image test; URL was then reset back to the default Pexels URL via PATCH /api/admin/settings so public hero image returns to the mother-shopping photo.
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Backend: 28 pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py - 7 new cases for settings (test_get_settings_public_no_auth, test_patch_admin_settings_requires_auth, test_patch_admin_settings_updates_and_get_reflects, test_patch_admin_settings_no_changes_returns_400, test_upload_hero_image_requires_auth, test_upload_hero_image_success_and_reflects, test_upload_hero_image_unsupported_format_returns_400). Frontend data-testids verified present: school-search-input, school-search-clear, school-card-, size-filter-select, school-filter-select, clear-filters-btn, admin-filters-bar, admin-tabs, tab-dashboard/products/orders/trash, stock-chart-card, admin-dashboard, admin-logout, hero-image (not strictly needed - hero detected via ), settings-panel (exists in code), size-breakdown-table (exists in code but not rendered). Missing: tab-settings. Contact page iframe ok. EmergentBadgeHider sets display:none on the offending

. After main agent fix, re-run only the 3 admin UI checks (tab-settings click -> settings-panel visible; Dashboard tab shows size-breakdown-table; selecting L size changes stat labels).
rca of the issue: Root cause: AdminDashboard.jsx includes the logic for SettingsPanel (line 326 renders inside TabsContent value='settings') and SizeBreakdownTable (line 333 component), but the parent TabsList (lines 229-242) only declares four TabsTriggers and the dashboard TabsContent (lines 244-282) never calls <SizeBreakdownTable/>. Additionally StatCard labels (lines 247-250) are static strings, not template literals with sizeFilter. These are pure JSX wiring omissions - all underlying state (sizeFilter, settings), handlers, API calls and components exist and work. Mitigation: main agent adds (a) TabsTrigger value='settings' with tab-settings testid and Ajustes icon; (b) <SizeBreakdownTable products={filteredProducts} sizeFilter={sizeFilter} /> inside dashboard TabsContent; (c) conditional label suffix in StatCard labels when sizeFilter!=='all'.
